caption:
Fudgy high-protein chocolate cheesecake

Follow me AND comment YUM and I’ll send my recipe straight to your inbox. 

I just made this dark chocolate cheesecake that was insanely delicious and healthy enough that you can eat it every day for breakfast. It’s packed full of protein and just a few simple good for you ingredients you need to try this.
author: theChefoutWest
transcript: I've been testing healthy high-protein dessert recipes and this fudgy chocolate cheesecake is by far the best dessert recipe I've ever made It's so easy to make all we're doing is adding Greek yogurt, cottage cheese, eggs, cocoa powder, oat flour, maple syrup, getting that blended together and baking it and you get the most insane high-protein chocolate cheesecake
title: Fudgy High-Protein Chocolate Cheesecake
one_liner: A healthy, high-protein chocolate cheesecake made with Greek yogurt and cottage cheese.
key_points: Blends Greek yogurt, cottage cheese, eggs, cocoa powder, oat flour, and maple syrup
Baked after blending — simple one-step prep
High-protein and healthy enough to eat daily for breakfast
Described as the best healthy dessert recipe the creator has ever made

instructions: 1. Add Greek yogurt, cottage cheese, eggs, cocoa powder, oat flour, and maple syrup to a blender.
2. Blend all ingredients together until smooth.
3. Pour mixture into a pan and bake until set.
